arts.ttl: Rodri replacement revealed as Man City seek damage limitation
arts.sum: The gravitas of Rodri’s situation was immediately obvious when the Man City midfielder stayed down after a challenge during the Arsenal game. A hush descended over the Etihad Stadium, and the fears of club supporters and staff were confirmed in the week after it was confirmed that the Spaniard had suffered an ACL tear and […] The post Rodri replacement revealed as Man City seek damage limitation appeared first on CaughtOffside.
